category_sources: Official Tokyo Dystopia homepage describes it as a full-text search system.
source_facts.description says it is a lightweight full-text search system.
display_name_sources: Official homepage title is Tokyo Dystopia.

Official homepage lists Tokyo Dystopia documents and source packages.

tags_sources: Official homepage describes N-gram search, multilingual Unicode support, and layered APIs.
